summary: Implemented specbridge-branch-inventory as a deterministic, read-only local CLI surface for branch debt observability. The command inventories local branch refs and local origin remote-tracking refs without network calls, reports per-branch metadata, prefix counts, merged-into-main status, preservation posture, cleanup_permission=none, aggregate totals, and branch_mutation_policy=none. Optional file output is limited to .specbridge/branch-inventory/current.inventory.json and requires -Force when replacing.
policy_result: Within policy. All changed files are inside the issue-212 exclusive_write scope. No protected files, secrets, production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, database, dependency, deployment, workflow, CI/CD security, operator decision registry, issue #194, or digital twin changes are included.
risk_result: Within bounds. The command is read-only when -OutputPath is omitted, reads only local Git refs and local origin remote-tracking refs, performs no network calls, and the only allowed write path is the governed branch inventory artifact. The feature explicitly performs no branch deletion, pruning, renaming, movement, archival, force-push, fetch, pull, or retention enforcement.
unresolved_risks: GitHub CI is pending until branch push and PR creation.
Post-merge closure is still required after the primary PR merges.
Future branch cleanup remains blocked until a dedicated policy and execution contract authorize it.
merge_status: Pending PR creation, GitHub CI, and merge gate.
